settings.heading:
24/7 Support For
Instant Help
settings.subheading: Experience seamless assistance that understands your needs and provides accurate solutions in seconds
settings.whatsapp_text: You can chat with our team to get an update on your orders
settings.email_text: We are always happy to hear from you.

settings.question: Where can I find my tracking number?
settings.answer: You will receive an automated email with your tracking number as soon as your order leaves our warehouse.

settings.question: How do I check my order status?
settings.answer: You can check your status by clicking the 'Track Order' link in your confirmation email or by logging into your account.

settings.question: My tracking hasn't updated in 2 days.
settings.answer: Carriers may experience delays in scanning. If there is no update for more than 4 business days, please contact us.

settings.question: Can I redirect my package while in transit?
settings.answer: For security reasons, we do not allow address redirections once the package has shipped.

settings.question: What if my package is marked as delivered but missing?
settings.answer: Please check around your property and with neighbors. If still not found, contact us within 48 hours.

settings.question: How often should I inflate the tires?
settings.answer: We recommend checking tire pressure once a week to prevent flats and ensure a smooth ride.

settings.question: How do I clean the motor and deck?
settings.answer: Use a damp cloth only. Never use a pressure washer or submerge any part of the scooter in water.

settings.question: Will riding in the cold damage the battery?
settings.answer: Cold temperatures can temporary reduce range. Always store and charge your battery at room temperature.

settings.question: How do I tighten the folding mechanism?
settings.answer: Use the provided hex keys to tighten the locking bolts if you notice any play in the stem.

settings.question: When should I replace my brake pads?
settings.answer: Replace brake pads when the material is less than 1mm thick or if you notice reduced stopping power.

settings.question: How long is the processing time?
settings.answer: Orders are typically processed within 1-2 business days before shipping.

settings.question: Which carriers do you use for delivery?
settings.answer: We primarily use FedEx, UPS, and Canada Post for reliable delivery across the country.

settings.question: Do you ship to remote northern regions?
settings.answer: Yes, we ship nationwide, though shipping times may be longer for remote territories.

settings.question: Are shipping boxes discreet?
settings.answer: Most large items ship in their original manufacturer packaging, which may display branding.

settings.question: Is insurance included in the shipping?
settings.answer: Yes, all shipments are fully insured against loss or damage during transit.

settings.title: Frequently Asked Questions
settings.subtitle: Quick answers to your most common questions about T-DOT Wheels from shipping to warranty to product care.
